title: Christopher Nolan’s Odyssey gets off to a great start.
summary: The epic made $264.1 million worldwide this weekend — Nolan’s biggest global opening yet — with $124.5 million in the US alone. Not bad for an R-rated adaptation of a 3,000-year-old poem.
